privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How {company} processes personal data for recruiters, team members, and candidates.
privacy.intro: {legalName} ({company}) operates an interview integrity decision-support platform for B2B customers. This Privacy Policy explains what we collect, why we process it, where it is stored, and your rights under the GDPR.
privacy.rolesCustomerOrgsAfter: for candidate screening data they upload.
privacy.rolesProcessorAfter: when handling candidate CVs, transcripts, and analysis on behalf of customers.
privacy.rolesControllerBefore: For account, billing, and marketing data relating to recruiters who register, we act as
privacy.sovereigntyParagraphBefore: All candidate content storage and AI inference remain within the European Union. Primary infrastructure is hosted on
privacy.rightsContactSuffix: . You may lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms governing use of the {company} platform.
terms.intro: These Terms are a contract between {legalName} and the organisation or individual registering for an account.
terms.serviceParagraphBefore: {company} provides interview integrity decision support for technical hiring. The platform does
terms.serviceParagraphAfter: make automated hiring or rejection decisions.
terms.disclaimerEmphasis: Integrity scores represent probability heuristics, not absolute verdicts.
terms.disclaimerRest: All outputs must be reviewed by qualified humans before action is taken.
terms.processingSuffix: applies when we process candidate data on your behalf.

dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement
dpa.description: Processor terms for candidate data handled on behalf of {company} customers.
dpa.intro: This DPA forms part of the agreement between the Customer (Controller) and {legalName} (Processor) when Customer uses {company} to process personal data relating to job candidates.
dpa.subjectPrefix: Processor will process candidate personal data only to provide integrity screening and related features described in the
dpa.natureItemStorage: Storage and parsing of CVs and interview transcripts
dpa.natureItemAnalysis: AI-assisted analysis to generate integrity scores and flags
dpa.natureItemDisplay: Display of results to authorised Customer users
dpa.subProcessorsParagraph: EU-based infrastructure (Hetzner) and AI inference (Mistral AI, France). Customer authorises these sub-processors subject to GDPR Article 28 requirements.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: How {company} uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookies.intro: We use cookies primarily for strictly necessary and functional purposes-not for third-party advertising profiles.
cookies.paymentParagraph: Stripe may set cookies required to complete payment and prevent fraud.

imprint.title: Imprint (Impressum)
imprint.description: Legal disclosure pursuant to § 5 TMG (Germany) and applicable EU requirements.
